title: Honey-Dijon Chicken Tacos with Charred Pepper Salsa
summary: Turn your Honey-Dijon Chicken & Pepper Traybake into epic tacos with charred pepper salsa and soured cream. Leftovers never tasted this good.

method.description: Before you begin, make the Honey-Dijon Chicken & Pepper Traybake batch recipe.
Add all the veggies from the batch onto a baking tray and slide under the grill to slightly char for 3-8 mins.
Shred the chicken using two forks and reheat gently in any leftover chicken juices.
Finely chop the grilled veg and coriander together with a knife, or pulse in a food processor until finely chopped. Transfer to a bowl and season with salt and lime juice to taste.
Warm the tortillas in a dry frying pan, under the grill, or in the oven.
Fill each tortilla with shredded chicken, a spoonful of soured cream, and plenty of charred pepper salsa. Get stuck in!

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
